---
name: Submit an Action Plan
about: Contribute a practical implementation guide for a specific audience
title: "[ACTION PLAN] Chapter X: [Your focus area]"
labels: action-plan, contribution
assignees: ''
---

## Chapter
Which chapter does this action plan implement? (e.g. Chapter 3: Ethics, Transparency & Anti-Corruption)

## Target Audience
Who is this action plan written for? (e.g. "Federal agency ethics officers", "State legislators", "City council members", "Nonprofit advocacy organizations")

## Your Background
Brief description of your relevant expertise or experience.

## Summary
1-3 sentences describing what your action plan covers.

## Draft
Paste your draft here, or attach as a file. Follow the structure:
- Who This Is For
- What You Can Do Now (within existing authority)
- What Requires Leadership Buy-In
- What Requires Legislation
- Resources

## Checklist
- [ ] I have read the relevant chapter at democracyproject2028.org
- [ ] My action plan focuses on implementation, not analysis (the chapter covers analysis)
- [ ] I have disclosed any relevant affiliations or conflicts of interest
- [ ] I agree to CC BY-SA 4.0 licensing of my contribution
